vibe: Deep grooves meet city pop soul. Jazz-funk fusion, broken beat, deep house warmth, and late-night Tokyo energy.

tracks.name: Jazzy Night
tracks.reason: City pop deep cut — same era as Momoko Kikuchi and Taeko Onuki but with a jazzier edge

tracks.name: OH NO, OH YES!
tracks.reason: Beyond Plastic Love — a funk-driven cut from Japan's city pop queen

tracks.name: Back On 74
tracks.reason: Disco-funk revival — connects Folamour's dancefloor energy with Sade's smooth vocals

tracks.name: Try n Follow
tracks.reason: Broken beat pioneer — bridges Yussef Dayes' jazz energy with Kerri Chandler's groove

tracks.name: I Feel the Rhythm - Inner Experience Revision
tracks.reason: Deep house royalty — same world as Osunlade and Motor City Drum Ensemble

tracks.name: It Runs Through Me (feat. De La Soul)
tracks.reason: Jazz-pop guitar warmth meets hip-hop — adjacent to Nujabes and Jordan Rakei

tracks.name: Can't Do Without You
tracks.reason: Electronic euphoria — connects Four Tet's warmth with &ME's dancefloor moments

tracks.name: Suede
tracks.reason: Anderson .Paak x Knxwledge's smoothest — lo-fi soul that pairs with Moodymann's late-night feel

tracks.name: Topdown
tracks.reason: LA deep house vocals — the missing link between KAYTRANADA and Chris Stussy

tracks.name: Toulouse
tracks.reason: Jazz-funk keys from Yussef Dayes' former partner — broken beat meets cosmic soul
